name: AI keyword generator and expander
description: Takes a seed keyword, uses Exa to find related search terms and trending queries, Claude AI expands and categorizes the keywords by intent and volume potential, then posts the organized keyword list to Slack. Adapted from n8n's Google Autosuggest keyword generation workflow.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for keyword research

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting keyword results

seedKeyword.description: The seed keyword to expand (e.g., 'project management software')

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the keyword results

industry.description: Industry or niche context for keyword generation

steps.name: Search Exa for related keywords and content

data.query: how to what is best way {{$.input.seedKeyword}} guide tutorial

steps.name: Compile search results for keyword extraction
Build Claude prompt for keyword expansion
Build Slack Block Kit keyword report
